pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler plugin configuration to target Java 21 instead of Java 8.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 8 bytecode, preventing the use of Java 21 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities or class version errors on a JDK 21 runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Define maven.compiler.source and maven.compiler.target properties to centralize version management.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to support the updated compiler plugin configuration referencing these properties for Java 21 compilation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the compiler plugin (like 2.5.1) do not support compiling for Java 21 targets and will fail or produce incorrect bytecode.
